input.final_summary: Mapped org-next and virtual-terminal app-mode auth integration to apps/auth. Key findings: both consumers use VITE_AUTH_APP_URL + AUTH_SESSION_SECRET in code, share authToken/refreshToken/idToken cookie names, and have local env/template drift that can break local/e2e auth wiring.

content.text:
Findings only, no files changed.

## Local App-Mode Flow
- `apps/org-next` builds auth URLs in `/Users/duhl/git/ui/apps/org-next/src/server/auth-app-url.server.ts` via `buildAuthAppLoginUrl`, `buildAuthAppLogoutUrl`, and `verifyAuthAppState`.
- `apps/virtual-terminal` mirrors that in `/Users/duhl/git/ui/apps/virtual-terminal/src/server/auth-app-url.server.ts`.
- Both delegate pure URL/state behavior to `src/server/auth-state.ts`:
  - `/authorize?app=<slug>&return_to=<relative>&auth_state=<signed>`
  - `/logout?app=<slug>&return_to=/login?logged_out=1`
  - `auth_state` is HMAC-SHA256 signed with `AUTH_SESSION_SECRET`.
- `apps/auth` receives this in `/Users/duhl/git/ui/apps/auth/src/features/auth/server-functions.ts` through `beginAuthorizeFn`, `logoutFn`, and `refreshAppTokensFn`.

## Cookies And Secrets
- Both consumers read TanStack `useSession` cookies in:
  - `/Users/duhl/git/ui/apps/org-next/src/server/session.server.ts`
  - `/Users/duhl/git/ui/apps/virtual-terminal/src/server/session.server.ts`
- Cookie names are fixed on the consumer side: `authToken`, `refreshToken`, `idToken`.
- Cookie payloads are `{ authToken }`, `{ refreshToken }`, `{ idToken }`; access token is used by org-next in `getOrgApiAccessToken` at `/Users/duhl/git/ui/apps/org-next/src/server/org-api.server.ts`.
- Auth writes/clears those cookies generically in `/Users/duhl/git/ui/apps/auth/src/lib/app-token-cookies.ts` using `appSessionConfig`, `writeAppTokenCookies`, and `clearAppTokenCookies`.
- Auth resolves app cookie names, allowed origins, cookie domain, and shared secret through `AUTH_APPS` in `/Users/duhl/git/ui/apps/auth/src/lib/app-integration.ts`.

## Env Drift / Local Risks
- Consumer code validates `AUTH_SESSION_SECRET` in:
  - `/Users/duhl/git/ui/apps/org-next/src/env.ts`
  - `/Users/duhl/git/ui/apps/virtual-terminal/src/env.ts`
- But several consumer env files still use `SESSION_SECRET`:
  - `/Users/duhl/git/ui/apps/org-next/.env.template`
  - `/Users/duhl/git/ui/apps/org-next/.env.local`
  - `/Users/duhl/git/ui/apps/org-next/.env.e2e`
  - `/Users/duhl/git/ui/apps/virtual-terminal/.env.template`
  - `/Users/duhl/git/ui/apps/virtual-terminal/.env.e2e`
- `/Users/duhl/git/ui/apps/virtual-terminal/.env.local` does use `AUTH_SESSION_SECRET` and points `VITE_AUTH_APP_URL` at `http://localhost:3208`.
- `/Users/duhl/git/ui/apps/org-next/.env.local` points `VITE_AUTH_APP_URL` at QA auth, not local auth, and uses `SESSION_SECRET`; that likely prevents local `apps/auth` cookie round-trip unless overridden.
- `/Users/duhl/git/ui/apps/auth/.env.local` has `APPS_SESSION_SECRET`, but app-mode resolution expects `AUTH_APPS` entries with `sessionSecretEnv`, e.g. `ORG_NEXT_SESSION_SECRET` and `VIRTUAL_TERMINAL_SESSION_SECRET`. I did not find local `AUTH_APPS` configured there.
- `AUTH_CALLBACK_URL` is for classic OAuth in auth; app-mode `/authorize?app=...` does not use callback URLs.

## Likely Impacted Tests/Config
- Consumer URL/state tests:
  - `/Users/duhl/git/ui/apps/org-next/src/server/auth-state.test.ts`
  - `/Users/duhl/git/ui/apps/virtual-terminal/src/server/auth-state.test.ts`
- Consumer cookie contract tests:
  - `/Users/duhl/git/ui/apps/org-next/src/server/session.test.ts`
- Org e2e/local auth flow:
  - `/Users/duhl/git/ui/apps/org-next/tests/auth-flow.spec.ts`
  - `/Users/duhl/git/ui/apps/org-next/tests/test-fixture.ts`
  - `/Users/duhl/git/ui/apps/org-next/src/routes/test-seed.auth.ts`
  - `/Users/duhl/git/ui/apps/org-next/playwright.config.ts`
- Auth registry contract tests:
  - `/Users/duhl/git/ui/apps/auth/src/lib/app-integration.org-next.test.ts`
  - `/Users/duhl/git/ui/apps/auth/src/lib/app-integration.virtual-terminal.test.ts`
  - `/Users/duhl/git/ui/apps/auth/src/lib/app-token-cookies.test.ts`
- Env/config likely needing alignment:
  - consumer `.env.template`, `.env.local`, `.env.e2e`
  - auth `.env.local`, `.env.template`, `.env.test`
  - docs in `/Users/duhl/git/ui/apps/auth/docs/app-integration.md`, `/Users/duhl/git/ui/apps/org-next/docs/README.md`, `/Users/duhl/git/ui/apps/virtual-terminal/docs/README.md`
